subcodes.first_line: Glorified be Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me oppressed among Thy servants and Thy creation, imprisoned in the hands of the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی مظلوما بین عبادک و خلقک و مسجونا فی ایدی الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
